comment: Master search-intelligence list for Coed-Travels email sweeps. Harvested from real inboxes (Joseph Gmail, work Outlook, Ella signup inbox). Data-only: senders are matched as substrings of the From address; subject rules are regex sources. Merge OVER baked-in defaults, never replace. No URLs, no code.
subjectBoost3a: trip details|your flight|your stay|your booking|boarding pass|your (upcoming )?trip|trip to
subjectBoost2: how was your stay|tell us about your stay|your recent stay|check-?out
junkSubjects: a taste of|starter itinerary awaits|your next (trip|adventure)|dream vacation|flash sale|today only|extra flight added|% off|price drop|\bdeals?\b|\bsale\b|bonus|limited time|last chance|weekly travel news|coupons?|just landed|selected for you|cash back|check out your tripit itinerary

notes.tripit: DEMOTED v3: TripIt emails are notification STUBS ('check out your itinerary' + link), not mirrored content — they wasted 5 extraction passes. Junk-subject filtered.
notes.delta: t.delta.com = transactional, o.delta.com = marketing. Booking receipts, check-in, trip-details all from t.delta.com.
notes.bilt: alerts.biltrewards.com = hotel booking confirmations; members.biltrewards.com = marketing.
notes.agoda: no-reply@agoda.com = confirmations; reply.agoda-emails.com check-in-day emails repeat the confirmation ID; sg.newsletter.* = junk.
notes.hilton: Post-stay feedback.hilton.com emails contain hotel name + checkout date — only email evidence for stays booked elsewhere.
notes.rakuten: messages.rakuten.com cashback mails match 'is confirmed' — must stay in junk list.
notes.calendar: Some bookings exist ONLY in the user's calendar (no email). A Google Calendar events pass is the known gap.
notes.united: notifications@united.com = trip reminders w/ reservation numbers; enews.united.com = marketing (junk); account-noreply = account notices.
notes.gds: youritinerary@worldspan.com delivers GDS itineraries for bank-portal bookings (Chase Travel etc.) — high value, easy to miss.
notes.amex: welcome.americanexpress.com (current) AND customerservice@mytrips.americanexpress.com (older) both carry Amex Travel confirmations.
